reviews.review_text: fun with friends. the actual story mode of the game is pretty boring but i enjoy going into the modded and destroying everything 9/10

Some friends and I tore through the campaign entirely in co-op and I have nothing but nice things to say about it. It truly feels like co-op play was always the intention. I've played half of this in single-player as well and I feel like the difficulty is appropriately tuned as the lobby increases in size.
I know it says 94 hours, but on my old steam account I had nearly 4000. the game is incredible in all respects. Nothing else to it.

The game is great but I can't recommend it to anyone susceptible to motion sickness. There are settings you can turn down such as motion blur, head bobbing and such, but somehow they don't elimiate the problem permanently, at least in my experience.
I have played a ton of shooters before from Half Life to modern ones and this is the  first game I genuinely cannot play for long, and its a shame.
If motion sickness is something you don't want to risk when playing a game, I highly recommed to skip this one.

it seriously qualifies as one of the worst multiplayer games in existence since when you play with friends your whole game starts tweaking and you cant even walk straight and i have even tried setting my settings to the lowest possible but it doesnt help anything so i wouldnt recommend if you want to play multiplayer
It is like the BEST GAME for physics(well not for all, but for satisfying destruction) Its so fun now that they added multiplayer. It is perfect for a download, perfect.

As someone that's played this game till full completion, achievement's , multiplayer, and dlc's (some) i could not recommended a more perfect game .my entire childhood yearned for this game and became the first game i bought on my pc and it held up to everything i could ever dream . it follows such a lovely formula of campaign design , from collection, hacking, and mainly destruction. i dont think i even have a hated level..... only a least favorite ...*cough* time trial at mansion *cough* but still every level brung a new challenge that i wanted to overcome. There is one level tho i love to call "pc specs check", its covert ops, but even with the lag that level is still one of my favs  I beat the game with all optional objectives completed and i honestly thought that was it, only to realize MULTIPLAYER finally released!!! it was such a blast having extra help , tho ive noticed having too many friends on levels makes then impossible due to to many time reductions to account for more people  -.-"" but with 4 friends its very enjoyable :3 . ive only played the art vandals dlc and the time travelers dlc, the art vandals one was very fun! even with such a tiny map i often times found myself having to reroute after i had 10 seconds to collect 3 more things =.="" still wonderfull level design with the old town and the suspended art museum :D  (biggest complaint is not getting even an message about painting the VERY CLEARLY NEEDIGN TO BE PAINTED fence that has a VERY RANDOM spray of yellow paint on it =n=) ((yes i painted the entire thing bite me =///=)) favorite missio was def the one involving collecting an objective from the fire tower. got every sinlge objective with such lil time to spare . (no hated levels at all or complaints amazing dlc ) Moving on to the time travelers dlc. wowwie, that introduction to the dlc, such a slap in the face with thinking youre just restarting the game and then bAM !! dlc time fu**boy :D then with having to use all this old timey stuff , you do all the levels and.... holey moley idk what they fed horses back then but im glad they were on my side  =~="" FAVORITE MISSION HAD TO BE 100% THE 8-10 OBJECTIVE ONE ... in the train station town thing -.-"" that level showed off peak design with the old west sniper, the sound design and look of that beauty was music ringing in my ears after every shot ~u~ (and its just fun shooting stuff) love how the camp also gets upgraded through the short campaign. (the final mission was a bit of a snake in the boot with time but still found it very enjoyable ) i have yet to play the other 3 dlc's due to wanting a break but i highly recommend checking them out yourselves.  hope this review wants you to buy the game even more!!!

I have been playing teardown from steam release (2022)

This game has changed so much throughout the years, Though. It remains as a destruction masterpiece.
ok this game is kinda laggy sometimes but its really fun and well made woul recommend
Fantastic game. One of the greatest sandbox games of all time, and an extremely enjoyable storyline on top of it. Especially fun to play with friends.
great game, modding is fun, multiplayer is also good, just a few bugs and the fact thre isnt voice chat

The engine and environment could be the foundation of great many games, but the game is boring and empty and requires mods to feel more alive, but even then it does NOT. I thought they will add life into this game, but you are alone in all maps and despite having guns, the only moving entities are indestructible robots.
I am glad and happy that Multiplayer was added. It makes the game more fun and also more chaotic when doing a tank battle >:3

Great game; nice combination of planning, problem solving, and action. For a few of the levels I resorted to looking up tutorials, but I probably could have figured them all out if I was patient enough.

I liked the games sandbox mode, something that would be good tho is NPCS if your playing sandbox mode. but the game is very good, one thing i would warn about is when installing a ton of mods (i did this) it makes the game laggy, and it will become slow when loading maps and stuff. but overall very good game and I like how much they have put into this.
very good base game lots to do but i havnt bought the dlcs so idk if they good
the physics are amazing and its a famus game
every time i try to play its a black screen and it makes the into sound but just black screen my desktop is a onn and the pc is a dell

Teardown... Its the best game when it comes to physics or you just being bored, I was the kind of player who played every so often until they added multiplayer, I played so much, forgetting the game modes. IF YOU... are getting the game you got to try multiplayer with game modes, Definitely trouble in teardown, murder mystery is so fun.
5 star in price worth 💵 
5 star in physics! 🔥
2.5 star in ping ... which is multiplayer as I do got to warn the ping can get pretty bad.
5 star in modding community 🗻
4.8 star in visuals, actually stunning shaders 🌟
Just give this game a try, and try multiplayer it will be worth your time.  ☑
best sandbox game, so fun to just take out the anger on the blocks

This game is just a whole lot of basically everything. Before, I watched youtubers like Slogo play this game, and now I finally have it. It's like Garry's Mod but with a story mode and more high quality. With the workshop, it's even more crazier. I mean like, who doesn't love strapping Hitler to a Porsche 911 with bombs all over it and driving it at max speed while watching his head getting absolutely obliterated.
This game is really fun if u love destruction. as there is mods to help with destruction this game is also fun to do the campaign. its kind of tuff to do but its easy to have it figured out.

i guess the game is good but i havent really had an opportunity to play it because it dosent support integrated graphics and stuff, also i didnt play this for 10 hours thats bugged i literally were not able to open it, i only opened teardown many years ago and it was able to run for some seconds, but now im sure it wont open so ill need to refund it also because i wanna buy minecraft wich costs 600 money and teardoing is like 500 money, im talking in pesos not dollars.

great game mulitplayer is super fun i love how they have a whole community on mods and sharing videos on the game and i love how i can destroy everything super fun would recommend if you love destorying things
ts game multiplayer is so peak like every one attacking eachother with pipe bombs and racing with tanks buy it
The game is very fun, but the game may not run well on slower machines when exploding or destroying a large building or something like that.

the game is very good and smooth for low end laptops or pc ect and its just overall fun exciting and you can also be creative in many ways even if its horror or war scary and the challenges are just as fun too.
this game is so fun with the phyics and destruction, if you are a plane fan and like destruction on your planes like me, then this game is perfect for you.

i love this game i used to play it on my playstation but whenever i tried to play it on steam when i load into the first level it always crashes and asks if i want to report the crash dump to the developers, i have 16gb ram which is enough to run the game smoothly dose anybody know why thi keeps happening?
Apart from obvious performance issues it is still the best sandbox destruction game ever, nothing can compare.
its a vary fun and interactive sandbox/campaign game

[b]Only[/b] problem with this game is the slippery slope regarding the whole Plus Pro Premium Ultra Edition Super+ Deluxe Platinum shenanigans. It's not predatory, though.

Gameplay is... Emm... at best. Game gives you all the tools you need to cheese everything. Have to scale a building in two seconds? Planks. Most challenges can be anticlimactically answered with the either the shotgun or planks.

[h1]Modding API is very intuitive[/h1]
Lua makes me wanna vomit in my mouth, but their API exposes most all core functionality of the engine with a VERY simple yet powerful interface. Developers definitely know what they're doing.

Play with the partner. Make a cute house together. Partner destroys house with bombs. Break up with the partner. Slowly come back to terms and forgive each other. Repeat.

Swedes sure love voxels, apparently.
Really fun gameplay and iconic voxel artstyle, Played with my friend in multiplayer a bunch and that was really fun too

Teardown is an immaculate work of art, the graphics are great (especially for a voxel game, so the system requirements don't like) but, you can do basically whatever you want in the game. It's versatile, and endlessly replayable... 12/10 people!

Physics are phenomenal, need decent pc, great game overall.

Huge fan of this while it was in early access, sucks that it sold out though. all of the new dlcs seem greedy but i am glad they finally added multiplayer to this game. regardless of the paywalls behind content that tuxedo labs promised to never enforce, i give this game a thumbs up.

it good game i go house light it go boom fire big smoke. and car in wall it go destruction very good game

If you like breaking things to let out stress, or just breaking things in general this is a great game

This game is like if Garry's Mod was more pixelated with a campaign with entertaining missions and sandbox on the side. Playing this game in multiplayer with workshop mods has given me some moments that were akin to my first time playing Garry's Mod. The physics are great and the maps are very destructible. The game has great graphics for a game mostly made of tiny cubes. It can run decently on a laptop without a graphics card but I wouldn't recommend it if you don't have patience to wait a couple minutes to load into anything or you can't handle when someone in multiplayer blows something up and your frames drop. It would be really great if custom player models were multiplayer compatible but the base game models aren't horrible. Definitely worth the price, I have bought it for myself and others and don't regret it at all. I might look into purchasing the DLC's as well once I finish what the base game has to offer.
great game but its kinda laggy, playing with friends is fun though.
the game itself without mods is fun for like 20 hours max, but with mods, i think if i had few hours more free every day, i would have at least 400 hours by now

This game has endless destruction a lot of good mods in the workshop and really fun with multiplayer. You would need a good laptop or PC to run this game but I approve this game. I like it a lot. You should get this game if you have more than two people very fun.

This game is really fun an entertaining with millions of possibilities during missions on how to succeed at the mission. Overall, it is a extremely fun game as it provides new things every time I play a level. Thanks for a great time.
сюжет не плохой, игра сама по себе вообще топовая. на ноутбучной карте и слабом процесоре у меня стабильные 144 фпса с кучей модов на ультрах.
игра крута, после чего зарезал трех негр под шконкой и типа ремпедж
super fun and relaxing i have autism and 80hd and it helps with it

Iconic game im ngl and as im writing this. This is one of the only games that are almost fully destructable within it. Idk how yall did it but with your hard work and dedication you truly made a masterpiece.

Очень прикольная игра. Довольно легко прошел на 100%. Смотря видео на ютубе, думал, что это, в основном, симулятор разрушений, но почти вся кампания - продумай и составь маршрут, чтобы пройти через всю карту, забрав предметы по заданию за минуту; также есть и несколько уникальных миссий, которые совершенно отличаются от других. Иногда это нормальная такая головоломка прям. На моем среднем пк игра стабильно тянет 60+ фпс в 1080р даже во время экшена и разрушений, при этом картинка замечательная. С модами, да в песочнице можно прям долго баловаться, но это уже на любителя. Рекомендую, на 26ч прохождения я бы взял и без скидки по актуальной цене

One of the very best puzzle and sandbox games money can buy. the voxel based deformation lets you tackle mission objectives in a variety of ways. This usually involves blowing holes through walls, making paths from one gap to another, that sort of thing. some strategies are better than others but there's enough flexibility here that a lot of people are probably gonna find different ways to beat each level and the game encourages you to get creative and experiment. It also helps that there's more than one type of objective in the campaign although there is a lot of heist focused levels.

 The voxel based destruction is satisfying enough on its own and has enough feedback that you might find yourself spending a large amount of time just destroying everything you see in sandbox. every type of material has its own physics feel and is gonna react a little differently to what you do. there's also a large backlog of mods to try. from new tools to new levels, spawners, and even entire games on the workshop. there's even multiplayer now. Can't recommend this game enough if you like methodical puzzle game or sandbox games.
laggy if you have a bad pc like me, but overall realistic, and the detailing for every pixel is great

there is SO many mods to choose from, and its also multiplayer, which was really fun!

you can do so much in this game, i love it!
def try this game out -- much love!

very good and fun game highly recommend great physics

It's a VERY interesting game, and I LOVE IT. I do want some weapons and vehicles, and maps, as well.
The game is super fun, the campaign is well made, but best of all the mods and the mod community are incredible.
really fun game. 10/10   phisics are really good. same with the graphics

The best Game ever, Even with Unreal Engine and Complex Voxels, the game has a beefy Optimization, One of the best things that the Modding is advanced and Large, I can say Teardown is the 2nd Best Sandbox Game, It's Peak (Not Like Gmod) but it's better than all the Sandbox Games I played, it's suitable for an ADHD One.

What a charming little game. The art direction is fantastic and the graphics are beautiful, yet it also runs super smoothly. I played most of it on my Steam Deck, and it feels as if this game was made for it.

The missions are actually engaging as well. You're encouraged to think creatively and use the destructible environments to your advantage. 

I wish more games this generation went this route - focusing on art direction, good performance, and physics-based gameplay. As it is, I'm thankful we've got Teardown. I highly recommend!
fun game storey or free play and suprisingly good performance even if on the pricer end have yet to play MP with frends played a 1 or 2 mini games and thare is a lot of potential

Just about 8+ hours on this game, here are my honest thoughts. 

Graphics:
   - Very Nice
   - Realistic "lego" like physics

Lag:
   - I have a higher-end pc but sometimes the game is self lags
   - When it lags pressing pause stops it, but still

Price:
   - A little pricy for the product
   - Would expect a little more for price

Story:
   - Game has a good story
   - Levels are somewhat fun

Game:
   - Very hard to use free mode
   - Game wants you to do story line

I had different expectations towards teardown. It's less of a heist simulator and more of a "destruction sandbox puzzles". Not my cup of tea, but I do recommend it for those that like messing about in sandboxes. Just don't go in blind and get disappointed like me.
